title: docs(governance): add C2 governance consistency report (M4 audit)
intent: M4 governance consistency audit grounded in origin/main at c06ecae4 (PR #206 merged). Verifies that the C2 canonical-authority implementation faithfully reflects the ratified governance from PR #202 (authorization anchor) through PR #206 (approver ratification framework). Confirms the governance corpus is internally consistent, the runtime matches governance, geometry-origin remains OPEN, and the anchor is empty/fail-closed with no back door. Deferred items catalogued; no contradictions found. No authority granted, no approver seeded, no runtime or GAMS change, C2 not reopened.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Adds C2_GOVERNANCE_CONSISTENCY_REPORT.md: the M4 capstone audit document confirming that M1-M3 governance implementation and published governance docs are mutually consistent. Documents milestone status, executive summary, per-dimension consistency findings, deferred items, and explicit non-actions.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: This is the first M4 audit document — a read-only consolidation pass over the M1-M3 outputs. It does not duplicate any of the prior governance documents (authorization anchor, approver ratification framework, etc.); it cross-references them to confirm consistency.

commands_run: git show --stat HEAD -- docs/governance/coordination/C2_GOVERNANCE_CONSISTENCY_REPORT.md -> 1 file changed, 134 insertions(+)

files.intent: M4 governance consistency audit: confirms C2 canonical-authority governance (M1-M3) is internally consistent and faithfully implemented. Read-only — no authority granted, no approver seeded, no runtime change.

architecture_scan.acknowledgement_notes: Documentation-only audit report. No code, runtime, or governance authority change. Read-only consolidation pass confirming M1-M3 consistency.
